## Research Summary

### Entity Identified
**COPAP MIDDLE EAST GENERAL TRADING CO. LLC** is the UAE legal entity of **COPAP Inc.**, a privately held Canadian trading house founded in 1989, headquartered in Montreal. COPAP explicitly lists **Dubai as one of its six global personnel hubs** (alongside New York, São Paulo, Bogotá, Hong Kong, Paris).
